rule_definition: Every ledger row keeps a stable trial_id, but row count alone is not effective trial count.
missing_evidence_policy: Treat duplicate or ambiguous trial_id as BLOCK until reconciled.
notes: Trial identity is necessary but insufficient.

purpose: Group dependent attempts before estimating effective count.
rule_definition: Trials sharing method_family and candidate/model/formula lineage should be treated as correlated unless evidence proves independence.
missing_evidence_policy: Use conservative dependency grouping; do not count as independent when lineage is not_available.
notes: This prevents treating small parameter variants as fully independent alphas.

rule_definition: Repeated rows from the same bounded six-formula sample should not each become independent model-selection trials unless they represent distinct evaluated formulas.
missing_evidence_policy: If formula evaluation was not performed, keep as sample_only_no_eval and exclude from selection-trial count.
notes: Existing six formula hashes are inventory/sample evidence, not evaluated alpha performance.

rule_definition: Only trained and validated model attempts with distinct model_hash and approved feature set can enter future selection-trial count.
missing_evidence_policy: If model_hash is not_available or training did not run, classify as report_only or blocked_no_model.
notes: ML v2 has no trained model and cannot contribute evaluated trials.

rule_definition: Numeric raw_trial_count can be summed as lower-bound evidence only when source report explicitly provides it; unknown rows remain unknown, not zero.
missing_evidence_policy: Do not impute unknown counts; keep not_available and report lower_bound_only.
notes: POST-06 lower bound 41 remains lower-bound only.

rule_definition: Future estimate should be no greater than raw count and should collapse dependent groups by lineage, scenario reuse, and parameter sweep family.
missing_evidence_policy: Do not calculate until dependency_group_manifest and exact raw count inventory exist.
notes: No effective trial count is calculated in this design.

purpose: Connect count method to future Deflated Sharpe.
rule_definition: Deflated Sharpe can be attempted only after approved validation returns and effective trial count are available.
missing_evidence_policy: If any required input is missing, keep Deflated Sharpe not_calculated and block model selection.
notes: This method design does not compute Sharpe or adjusted score.

rule_definition: Future effective trial count requires duplicate audit, dependency group manifest, exact raw count inventory, and approved validation-return inputs.
missing_evidence_policy: Current ML v2 training gate remains BLOCK.
notes: Report-only design complete; no training or metric computation authorized.
